verses.2: “How long will you hunt for words?
verses.3: Why are we counted as animals,
verses.4: You who tear yourself in your anger,
verses.5: “Yes, the light of the wicked will be put out.
verses.6: The light will be dark in his tent.
verses.7: The steps of his strength will be shortened.
verses.8: For he is cast into a net by his own feet,
verses.9: A snare will take him by the heel.
verses.10: A noose is hidden for him in the ground,
verses.11: Terrors will make him afraid on every side,
verses.13: The members of his body will be devoured.
verses.14: He will be rooted out of the security of his tent.
verses.15: There will dwell in his tent that which is none of his.
verses.16: His roots will be dried up beneath.
verses.17: His memory will perish from the earth.
verses.18: He will be driven from light into darkness,
verses.19: He will have neither son nor grandson among his people,
verses.20: Those who come after will be astonished at his day,
verses.21: Surely such are the dwellings of the unrighteous.
